clauses.title: Scope of safety management
clauses.text: This part specifies requirements for managing the safety lifecycle, including planning, resource allocation, and documentation control.
notes: Safety management spans the entire product lifecycle.

clauses.title: Safety plan
clauses.text: A safety plan shall be created that defines the activities, responsibilities, milestones, and work products for the safety lifecycle.
notes: The plan shall be maintained and updated as the project evolves.

clauses.title: Documentation management
clauses.text: All safety-related documentation shall be version-controlled with traceability to requirements and change history.
notes: Includes review workflows and access control.

clauses.title: Competence management
clauses.text: Personnel performing safety activities shall have demonstrated competence through training, experience, or qualification records.
notes: Higher safety integrity levels require more rigorous competence evidence.
